title: China’s first homegrown quantum computing operating system available for online download - Global Times
why:
- China has released its first domestically developed quantum computer operating system, Origin Pilot, as an open-source platform available for online download.
- Origin Pilot is described as the world's first open-source quantum computer operating system publicly available for download, aiming to lower development barriers and support the quantum computing ecosystem.
- The system is compatible with multiple quantum hardware approaches, including superconducting qubits, trapped ions, and neutral atoms, and supports integration with various quantum chips.
- Origin Pilot supports central functions like parallel execution of quantum tasks and automatic qubit calibration, improving system efficiency for practical deployment.
- Unlike offerings from major US companies, Origin Pilot is the first globally available downloadable quantum computer OS, rather than just a cloud service or programming framework.
- The open-download model allows research institutions, universities, and developers worldwide to access and contribute to the quantum computing software ecosystem.
